channel.title: Brodie Robertson
channel.description:
For all general enquiries feel free to contact me through any social media service listed below, If you'd like to longer form something longer form like fan mail or you have a video suggestion, feel free to send me an email.
If you'd like to chat, then come join my Discord: https://brodierobertson.xyz/discord All of the scripts and configs that I write are available on my GitHub. Email: brodierobertsonbusiness@gmail.com
channel.itunes:author: Brodie Robertson
channel.itunes:subtitle: Brodie Robertson
channel.itunes:summary:
For all general enquiries feel free to contact me through any social media service listed below, If you'd like to longer form something longer form like fan mail or you have a video suggestion, feel free to send me an email.
If you'd like to chat, then come join my Discord: https://brodierobertson.xyz/discord All of the scripts and configs that I write are available on my GitHub. Email: brodierobertsonbusiness@gmail.com

item.title: This Is Why I Love Linux Desktops
item.description:
What I love the most about open source projects is they're not afraid to just yoink ideas that come from another project if they happen to be good ideas like what COSMIC did with KDEs X11 legacy hot key feature.
==========Support The Channel========== ► Patreon: https://brodierobertson.xyz/patreon ► Paypal: https://brodierobertson.xyz/paypal ► Liberapay: https://brodierobertson.xyz/liberapay ► Amazon USA: https://brodierobertson.xyz/amazonusa
==========Resources========== COSMIC Issue: https://github.com/pop-os/cosmic-comp/issues/897 Othe Direction: https://github.com/pop-os/xdg-desktop-portal-cosmic/issues/4
=========Video Platforms========== 🎥 Odysee: https://brodierobertson.xyz/odysee 🎥 Podcast: https://techovertea.xyz/youtube 🎮 Gaming: https://brodierobertson.xyz/gaming
==========Social Media========== 🎤 Discord: https://brodierobertson.xyz/discord 🐦 Twitter: https://brodierobertson.xyz/twitter 🌐 Mastodon: https://brodierobertson.xyz/mastodon 🖥️ GitHub: https://brodierobertson.xyz/github
==========Credits========== 🎨 Channel Art: Profile Picture: https://www.instagram.com/supercozman_draws/
🎵 Ending music Track: Debris & Jonth - Game Time [NCS Release] Music provided by NoCopyrightSounds. Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yDTvvOTie0w Free Download / Stream: http://ncs.io/GameTime
#Linux #COSMIC #KDE #OpenSource #FOSS
DISCLOSURE: Wherever possible I use referral links, which means if you click one of the links in this video or description and make a purchase I may receive a small commission or other compensation.

What I love the most about open source projects is they're not afraid to just yoink ideas that come from another project if they happen to be good ideas like what COSMIC did with KDEs X11 legacy hot key feature.

item.title: Nvidia Cares About Open Source... Sometimes
item.description:
Sometimes NVIDIA cares about open source... sometimes, and recently they decided to make Nvidia Flow and Nvidia PhysX fully open source.
==========Support The Channel========== ► Patreon: https://brodierobertson.xyz/patreon ► Paypal: https://brodierobertson.xyz/paypal ► Liberapay: https://brodierobertson.xyz/liberapay ► Amazon USA: https://brodierobertson.xyz/amazonusa
==========Resources========== Article: https://wccftech.com/nvidia-physx-and-flow-are-now-fully-open-source/ PhysX source available page: https://web.archive.org/web/20150323140008/https://developer.nvidia.com/physx-source-github Physx Github: https://github.com/NVIDIA-Omniverse/PhysX PhysX Discussion Thread: https://github.com/NVIDIA-Omniverse/PhysX/discussions/384
=========Video Platforms========== 🎥 Odysee: https://brodierobertson.xyz/odysee 🎥 Podcast: https://techovertea.xyz/youtube 🎮 Gaming: https://brodierobertson.xyz/gaming
==========Social Media========== 🎤 Discord: https://brodierobertson.xyz/discord 🐦 Twitter: https://brodierobertson.xyz/twitter 🌐 Mastodon: https://brodierobertson.xyz/mastodon 🖥️ GitHub: https://brodierobertson.xyz/github
==========Credits========== 🎨 Channel Art: Profile Picture: https://www.instagram.com/supercozman_draws/
🎵 Ending music Track: Debris & Jonth - Game Time [NCS Release] Music provided by NoCopyrightSounds. Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yDTvvOTie0w Free Download / Stream: http://ncs.io/GameTime
#Nvidia #Physx #Flow #OpenSource #FOSS #Linux
DISCLOSURE: Wherever possible I use referral links, which means if you click one of the links in this video or description and make a purchase I may receive a small commission or other compensation.
